title: Physical Exercise for Prevention of Dementia
text:
Summary: The principal aim of this study is to verify whether a program of supervised, multimodal physical exercise improves cognitive function and/or reduces the rate of cognitive decline in older adults
Inclusion criteria: inclusion criteria: 

 Age > 50 years old 

 
Exclusion criteria: : 

 Medical conditions that compromise survival or limit physical activity 

 Geriatric Depression Scale-15 score of 6 or higher 

 Alcohol intake > 4 units/day 

 Mini- Mental State Examination < 24 

 Clinical Dementia Rating score of 1 or more
